monday.description: Pan-seared duck liver served with parboiled rice, roasted sweet potatoes, and a rich Sauce Diane reduction.

tuesday.description: Trofie pasta tossed with sautéed whiteleg shrimp, steamed romanesco, and a light Reduced-sodium Pomodoro Sauce.

wednesday.description: Pickled herring served atop a bed of organic basmati rice, roasted butternut squash, and finished with pomegranate seeds.

thursday.description: Pici pasta tossed with smoked boudin noir, sliced cucumbers, and a sprinkle of Ground Furikake Seasoning.

friday.description: Crispy free-range chicken skin served over whole grain teff, roasted jerusalem artichokes, and finished with cold-pressed olive oil.

monday.description: Grated caciotta cheese baked with fresh hedgehog mushrooms, barbari bread, and a sprinkle of hazelnut meal.

tuesday.description: Sliced dubliner cheese stir-fried with lo mein noodles, organic radicchio, and a hint of yuzu kosho.

wednesday.description: Organic large brown eggs scrambled with organic soybean sprouts, served with hot dog buns and a sprinkle of ground black pepper.

thursday.description: Roasted peanuts and whole grain steel-cut oats served with sautéed organic swiss chard and a drizzle of sorghum syrup.

friday.description: Idiazabal cheese melted over toasted gluten-free lavash, topped with truffle and a sprinkle of dried hierba buena.
